metadata.title: States PCS: Andhra Pradesh GK For APPSC Examinations

questions.question: Which major port city in Andhra Pradesh was established in 1068 AD?
questions.explanation: Visakhapatnam, also known as Vizag, is a historic port city in Andhra Pradesh established in 1068 AD.

questions.question: Which dynasty was the last ruling dynasty of the former princely state of Hyderabad?
questions.explanation: The Asaf Jahi dynasty, also known as the Nizams, ruled Hyderabad until its annexation in 1948.

questions.question: Which Hindu pilgrimage site near Nakkapalle is renowned for the Lord Venkateswara Swamy temple?
questions.explanation: Upamaka, near Nakkapalle, is famous for the Lord Venkateswara Swamy temple, a notable pilgrimage site in Andhra Pradesh.

questions.question: Who is famously known as Amarajeevi for his sacrifice and pivotal role in the formation of Andhra State?
questions.explanation: Potti Sreeramulu died after a 56-day hunger strike demanding Andhra State, leading to its creation in 1953.

questions.question: Which village in Eluru district has been designated as a Smart Village by the Andhra Pradesh government?
questions.explanation: Chataparru village in Eluru district is officially recognized as a Smart Village by Andhra Pradesh government.

questions.question: Who was the first Dalit and Telugu cardinal appointed by Pope Francis in 2022?
questions.explanation: Anthony Poola, born in Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh, became the first Dalit and Telugu cardinal in 2022.

questions.question: Who composed the 17th-century Sanskrit opera Sri Krishna Leela Tarangini?
questions.explanation: Sri Krishna Leela Tarangini, a Sanskrit opera with 12 Tarangams, was composed by Narayana Teertha in the 17th century.

questions.question: Which district in Andhra Pradesh is home to the Kondapalli Reserve Forest?
questions.explanation: Kondapalli Reserve Forest is located in Krishna district, known for its unique Tella Poniki softwood used in Kondapalli toys.

questions.question: Who was the 9th century BCE Jain emperor of Kalinga, renowned as the Bull among Kings?
questions.explanation: Karakandu was a 9th century BCE Jain emperor of Kalinga, known as Bull among Kings and featured in Jain and Buddhist texts.

questions.question: Who was the first principal of Maharajah’s Government College of Music and Dance in Andhra Pradesh and is credited with creating the art form Hari Katha?
questions.explanation: Ajjada Adibhatla Narayana Dasu was a polymath from Andhra Pradesh, creator of Hari Katha, and first principal of Maharajah’s Government College of Music and Dance.
